provenance.source_corpus: Production and outplanting success of nutrient-loaded aspen seedlings

source_spans.text: SGI treatment allows for the production of nutrient loaded aspen seedlings
SGI treatment allows for the production of nutrient loaded aspen seedlings

nodes.name: woody tissue nutrient and carbohydrate concentrations

source_spans.text: SGI application, on the other hand, resulted in complete height growth cessation and a subsequent switch from allocating nutrients and carbohydrates from growth to reserves which resulted in nutrient and carbohydrate loaded aspen seedlings
SGI treated seedlings had higher RSRs than non-SGI treated seedlings
Seedlings treated with SGI had significantly higher TNC concentrations in both the root and stem tissues
High feed seedlings continued to show greater height growth than standard feed seedlings (21%) on PMM
High feed seedlings continued to show greater height growth than standard feed seedlings (21%) on PMM
seedlings growing on PMM outperformed seedlings on FFM (in terms of seedling height in 2011 and 2012)
In 2012 only CRF fertilization resulted in height growth greater than that on control plots
EXP seedlings had lower stem and root dry weight than 100-100 seedlings
EXP seedlings had lower stem and root dry weight than 100-100 seedlings
the aspen seedlings used in this study showed very high survival rates (95.1%), likely due to the use of the shoot growth inhibitor paclobutrazol

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:17b63c9a4a13
edges.original_sentence: SGI treatment allows for the production of nutrient loaded aspen seedlings, produces uniform and quality seedling stock, and can reduce broadcast fertilization needs on reclamation sites.
